steps.title: Read the line direction
steps.content: The line of best fit decreases from left to right, so its slope is negative. It crosses the $y$-axis above $0$, so its intercept is positive.

steps.title: Estimate slope and intercept
steps.content:
Two readable points on the line are about $(0,13.5)$ and $(10,5.5)$. The slope is:
$$m=\frac{5.5-13.5}{10-0}=-0.8$$
The intercept is $13.5$, so the equation is $y=13.5-0.8x$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Enter the two estimated points and compare the line to the plotted trend. The answer is B.
